name: Prasidh Krishna
profileSummary: Muralikrishna Prasidh Krishna is an Indian international cricketer. He plays for the Indian national cricket team, as a right-arm fast-medium bowler. He represents Karnataka in domestic cricket and Gujarat Titans in the Indian Premier League. He was a part of the Indian squad which won the 2023 Asia Cup and were runners-up in the 2023 Cricket World Cup.
